result.stdout:
dotTrace command-line profiler 2026.1 RC 1 build 777.0.20260319.155754-rc01. Copyright (C) 2026 JetBrains s.r.o.
Usage: dottrace <command>

  <command>
    start                           Start a standalone .NET application
                                    under profiling
    attach                          Attach profiler to a running .NET process
  
  To get help for a particular command, use
    dottrace help <command>
  A performance snapshot is taken either by timeout (set in config) or after the profiled application finishes working.
  
  Exit codes: 
       0 = Success
      65 = Failure
  
  Examples
  ~~~~~~~~
  
    Profile the 'MyApp' .NET Core application using the 'Sampling' mode,
    save a snapshot to the 'snapshot.dtp' file in the current directory:
      dottrace start --framework=NetCore --save-to=snapshot.dtp /usr/bin/dotnet ./MyNetCoreApp.dll
    
    Profile the 'MyApp.exe' Mono application using the 'Timeline' mode,
    save a snapshot to the 'snapshot.dtp' file in the current directory:
      dottrace start --framework=Mono --profiling-type=Timeline --save-to=snapshot.dtp /usr/bin/mono MyApp.exe
